source.description: Six-panel marker-doodle contact sheet generated during the June 25 Doodle.day run, then promoted from the generated-image cache after review.
source.notes: Originally an alternate candidate for June 25; preserved because the subject has strong Doodle.day fit.

process_strategy: The sheet builds one centered robot head from basic rounded rectangle construction through antenna, ears, face, neck plate, buttons, marker color, and final outline punch-up.

final_elements.name: rounded robot head
final_elements.description: A wide rounded rectangle robot head with a centered guide line.

final_elements.name: spring antenna
final_elements.description: A zigzag spring antenna with a round yellow ball on top.

final_elements.name: side bolts
final_elements.description: Small horizontal bolt shapes on each side of the head.

final_elements.name: mismatched eyes
final_elements.description: One round eye and one square eye with black pupils.

final_elements.name: toothy grin
final_elements.description: A wide curved robot smile divided into simple square teeth.

final_elements.name: bottom control panel
final_elements.description: A small rectangular panel under the head with three button circles.

final_elements.name: blue head fill
final_elements.description: Bright blue marker fill across the robot head and bottom panel.

final_elements.name: yellow and red accent fills
final_elements.description: Yellow fill for the antenna and side bolts plus red fill for the bottom buttons.

final_elements.name: white highlight marks
final_elements.description: Small white shine marks on the robot head and antenna ball.

frames.visible_job: Draws the rounded rectangle robot head and center guide.
Adds the zigzag antenna, top ball, and side bolt shapes.
Adds the mismatched eyes, pupils, and wide toothy grin.
Adds the bottom control panel and three button circles.
Adds blue marker fill, yellow accents, red buttons, and white highlight marks.

final_step.visible_job: Thickens the black outline, strengthens marker fills, and cleans already introduced highlights.
allowed_changes: minor edge clarification on already introduced eyes, grin, antenna, bolts, and buttons

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
